overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a foggy rural trail through dense vegetation, passing a roadside camp, and approaching a hilltop checkpoint with soldiers and a distant medieval castle visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy forest trail with dense undergrowth

events.description: passes an NPC standing on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt trail surrounded by dense foggy vegetation

notable_agents.action: standing by the path at the beginning of the segment

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
thick green undergrowth lining the left side of the path
thick green undergrowth lining the right side of the path
tall trees barely visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through dense, foggy woodland. The vegetation is thick on both sides with tall trees barely visible through the mist. An NPC stands briefly by the path at the start before the trail continues deeper into the fog.

events.description: emerging from dense forest into a clearing with a roadside camp
passing the camp and entering more open countryside with fencing

agents.ego_description: walking past a roadside encampment with a canopy shelter and wooden cart on the right

entered.detail: canvas shelter with wooden poles serving as a merchant stall
wooden wagon parked beside the tent
rustic wooden fence lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail opens to reveal a roadside camp with a canvas canopy and wooden cart on the right. Wooden fences begin to line the path as the dense forest gives way to more open rural scenery.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside with distant castle view

events.description: medieval castle becomes visible through the fog in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along a fenced country path with a castle visible in the distance

entered.detail: large stone medieval castle with towers visible through the fog
abandoned broken cart on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path continues through open countryside bordered by wooden fences. A large stone castle becomes visible through the fog in the distance, and the terrain gradually begins to slope upward.

events.description: path inclines steeply as approaching hilltop checkpoint
soldiers become visible standing guard on the hilltop

agents.ego_description: climbing the rocky hill toward a group of soldiers standing guard at the top

notable_agents.action: soldiers standing guard on the hilltop with spears and armor

entered.detail: armed guards in medieval armor standing on the hilltop
stone fortification walls of the castle complex
defensive wooden barriers lining the path

segments.scene_description: The path becomes rocky and steep as it ascends the hill toward a military checkpoint. Several soldiers stand guard at the top with a fortified castle visible in the background, marking the approach to a settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, foggy woodland that gradually opens into a steep ascent toward a fortified military outpost. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail flanked by thick vegetation and towering trees obscured by heavy mist. As the forest thins, the trail expands to reveal a roadside camp with a canvas canopy and wooden cart, while wooden fences begin to line the path. The scene then shifts into open countryside where a large stone castle emerges through the distant fog as the terrain begins to slope upward. Finally, the path becomes rocky and steep, climbing the hill toward a checkpoint guarded by soldiers with the fortified castle looming in the background.
